subcodes.first_line: In this day doth the Mother Book call out, and the Qur'an beareth mention, for it is the Dawning-Place of Revelation and the Source of Divine Inspiration [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز ام الکتاب ندا میفرماید و فرقان ذکر مینماید چه که مشرق وحی و مطلع الهام
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @outward and inward meanings, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
